<!--

classDiagram
  class notifications{
    *INTEGER id NOT NULL
    TIMESTAMP created_at
    BOOLEAN is_read
    VARCHAR message NOT NULL
    VARCHAR target_role
    VARCHAR title NOT NULL
    VARCHAR type NOT NULL
  }
  class users{
    *INTEGER id NOT NULL
    TEXT bio
    VARCHAR email NOT NULL
    VARCHAR fullname NOT NULL
    VARCHAR location
    VARCHAR password NOT NULL
    VARCHAR phone
    VARCHAR profile_image_url
    VARCHAR role
  }
  class candidates{
    *INTEGER id NOT NULL
    VARCHAR current_company
    VARCHAR current_job_title
    INTEGER experience_years
    VARCHAR highest_degree
    VARCHAR resume_url
    JSON skills
    VARCHAR university
  }
  class hr_staffs{
    *INTEGER id NOT NULL
    VARCHAR company_name NOT NULL
    VARCHAR department
    VARCHAR position
  }
  class admins{
    *INTEGER id NOT NULL
    VARCHAR managed_region
  }
  class job_descriptions{
    *INTEGER id NOT NULL
    VARCHAR department NOT NULL
    VARCHAR description NOT NULL
    BOOLEAN is_active
    VARCHAR job_id NOT NULL
    VARCHAR job_title NOT NULL
    VARCHAR<10> job_type NOT NULL
    VARCHAR location NOT NULL
    VARCHAR salary_range
    VARCHAR skills_requirements
  }
  class job_applications{
    *INTEGER id NOT NULL
    VARCHAR candidate_email NOT NULL
    VARCHAR candidate_name NOT NULL
    VARCHAR college
    VARCHAR company
    TIMESTAMP created_at
    VARCHAR degree
    INTEGER job_id NOT NULL
    VARCHAR job_title
    VARCHAR location
    DOUBLE PRECISION match_score
    VARCHAR phone
    VARCHAR profile_image_url
    VARCHAR relevance
    JSON skills
    VARCHAR status
    TIMESTAMP updated_at
  }
  class resumes{
    *INTEGER id NOT NULL
    INTEGER candidate_id NOT NULL
    TIMESTAMP created_at
    VARCHAR file_url
    VARCHAR filename NOT NULL
    JSON parsed_data
    TIMESTAMP updated_at
  }
  users "1" -- "1" candidates
  users "1" -- "1" hr_staffs
  users "1" -- "1" admins
  job_descriptions "1" -- "0..n" job_applications
  candidates "1" -- "0..n" resumes

-->
![](https://mermaid.)
